response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains and a strong track record of building and open-sourcing technical tools, but lacks explicit AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or demonstrable AI-driven platform development at scale — key requirements for this principal engineer role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across languages and systems
Proven track record of open-source AI-agent and infrastructure tooling contributions
Strong technical leadership and knowledge-sharing via workshops and community projects
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading AI-powered cloud products or platforms
Limited visibility into cloud architecture strategy or customer-facing AI advisory experience
No advanced degree in AI or related field, and startup/intrapreneurial AI experience is implied but not demonstrated
